ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Kokoro Systems K.K. (listed on Hinode Stock Exchange Prime) Privacy and MNPI Handling Notice for Proposed Acquisition of Aoba Robotics G.K.

Under the APPI, we process personal data of living individuals, including individual numbers (My Number) and individual identification codes, for HR, payroll, and board-governed acquisition workflows.

Third-party provision: during diligence we may transfer limited employee data to processors (e.g., Hanazono Due Diligence Ltd. and Hinode Securities Clearing Center, both fictional) under contract requiring safeguards and foreign data disclosure notices per APPI.
Transfers outside Japan, if any, require prior opt-in consent and notice of the foreign personal information protection system; records of provision are maintained for three years.

DSAR limits: we may refuse or defer disclosure if disclosure is likely to seriously impede proper conduct of the acquisition or violate the FIEA, while providing reasons and complaint routes to the competent authority.
biometric data (finger-vein template hash for facility entry)
excluded from DSAR copies until public announcement
board resolutions on consideration, offer period, or ratio

must_detect.matched_text:
Kokoro Systems K.K. (listed on Hinode Stock Exchange Prime) Privacy and MNPI Handling Notice for Proposed Acquisition of Aoba Robotics G.K.
Under the APPI, we process personal data of living individuals, including individual numbers (My Number) and individual identification codes, for HR, payroll, and board-governed acquisition workflows.
Contact for DSARs and questions: privacy@kokorosys.example.jp; we aim to respond within 30 days unless an APPI exception applies.
Named subject: Mr. Daichi Sato (Employee ID KS-1782; My Number masked: ****-****-4820) — health information (Type 1 diabetes management record) and biometric data (finger-vein template hash for facility entry) are processed with consent and role-based access control.
Named subject: Dr. Mina Kurosu (R&D; badge MK-0093) self-identifies as lesbian and requested religious accommodations for Shinto observances; these special-category attributes are collected only for workplace inclusion and scheduling purposes.
For dependent administration, Mr. Sato’s minor child, Tomo Sato (age 15), is recorded for health insurance enrollment; no genetic testing data is held for Tomo.
We never process union voting records or political opinions for recruitment decisions, and our Harmony Workplace Charter uses terms like religion and sexual orientation only in a general DEI context.
MNPI workflow: undisclosed enumerated material facts and tender-offer facts under the FIEA (e.g., board resolutions on consideration, offer period, or ratio) are restricted to insiders and excluded from DSAR copies until public announcement.
On 2 May, the board of Kokoro Systems K.K. resolved to enter due diligence on Aoba Robotics G.K.; a trading blackout and “cherry-blossom strategy” communications plan were activated for designated insiders.
Third-party provision: during diligence we may transfer limited employee data to processors (e.g., Hanazono Due Diligence Ltd. and Hinode Securities Clearing Center, both fictional) under contract requiring safeguards and foreign data disclosure notices per APPI.
Transfers outside Japan, if any, require prior opt-in consent and notice of the foreign personal information protection system; records of provision are maintained for three years.
Retention: biometric access logs are retained for 12 months; special-category HR notes (health or sexual-orientation accommodations) are reviewed every 6 months and deleted when no longer necessary.
My Number data are used only for statutory purposes and are segregated, encrypted, and deleted without delay after retention periods mandated by payroll/tax laws expire.
DSAR limits: we may refuse or defer disclosure if disclosure is likely to seriously impede proper conduct of the acquisition or violate the FIEA, while providing reasons and complaint routes to the competent authority.
Benign noise: our SakuraShield 2.0 product launch in Midoriyama Ward and the Seika Swallows friendly match have no relation to health, religion, or sexual orientation personal data.
We value diversity, equity, and inclusion and avoid metaphors like “moving the goalposts” in official notices, though project codenames (e.g., Project Hikari) may appear in internal emails.
